# Beast Creative Agency — llms.txt
# Machine-readable summary for AI search engines and language models.
# Full content: https://beastcreativeagency.com

## Business
Beast Creative Agency is a CPG and digital marketing agency headquartered in San Antonio, Texas. Founded in 2020, the agency specializes in consumer packaged goods (CPG) marketing, SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), paid media, branding, and AI-powered content production. Beast Creative serves food, beverage, and consumer brands scaling from regional distribution to national retail.

## Services
- CPG Marketing: sweepstakes campaigns, first-party consumer data collection, retail-readiness campaigns for food and beverage brands entering Walmart, H-E-B, Target, and Kroger
- SEO + AEO: traditional search engine optimization combined with AI search citation strategies for ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
- Paid Media: AI-optimized campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and Google Ads
- AI Content Production: recipe videos, product demos, social content, and ad copy at scale using AI pipelines
- Branding & Identity: brand naming, visual systems, logo design, and brand identities
- Web Design & CRO: conversion-focused, mobile-first website builds

## Verified Client Results (all attributed, all real)
- Sun-Bird Seasonings (national Walmart rollout): 36,581 consumer emails collected on a $6,000 budget; 7.03% CTR vs 0.89% industry average; $0.12 CPC vs $0.28 industry average
- Williams Foods Back-to-School Sweepstakes: 22,043 entries on a $4,000 budget; 2.2x over 10,000-entry goal; $0.18 CPC
- Williams All-Stars Trading Card Campaign: 13,660 sweepstakes entries in 24 days
- Williams Bowl Campaign: 6,020 entries on a $1,500 budget
- Sweet Sensi (CBD e-commerce): 500%+ MRR growth through SEO + social media strategy
- Coinline: full brand identity and naming for arcade-themed fintech brand
